source.name: us-relocation-2026 joined metro dataset
source.method: Joined denormalized layer. One object per metro with gate + cost + climate + amenity + blend.

data_pulls_added.name: Census ACS county property tax (59 metros)
data_pulls_added.impact: Reveals 2-3x intra-state variation (e.g., Shelby TN 1.12% vs TN state 0.67%)

data_pulls_added.name: Memphis + Pittsburgh crime (3 years)
data_pulls_added.impact: Fills the largest data gap. Per-100K rates: Memphis ~10-12K, Pittsburgh ~3K.

climate.sunny_proxy_note: sunny_proxy now = sunshine_hours_annual / 12 (a fully-sunny 12-hr day = 1 proxy day). Dashboard scoring min(sunny_proxy / 36.5, 10) maps 365 proxy days → 10/10 score.

workarounds: broadband: Census requires free API key (api.census.gov/key)
crime: FBI CDE API requires paid tier; use state-aggregate published estimates
schools quality: GreatSchools Puppeteer scrape (deferred; gate-only heuristic currently)

schools.rationale: Tennessee schools variable; Nashville-area (Williamson County) is top-5 in state

crime.source: MPD Public Safety Incidents / WPRDC UCR Blotter
crime.data_quality_note: Pittsburgh UCR dataset has ~41% NA-category rows in 2022; violent/property rates likely undercounted by similar margin. Compare Memphis's UCR categories (clean) vs Pittsburgh's NA-heavy for honest reading.

climate.sunny_proxy_note: sunny_proxy now = sunshine_hours_annual / 12 (a fully-sunny 12-hr day = 1 proxy day). Dashboard scoring min(sunny_proxy / 36.5, 10) maps 365 proxy days → 10/10 score.

workarounds: broadband: Census requires free API key (api.census.gov/key)
crime: FBI CDE API requires paid tier; use state-aggregate published estimates
schools quality: GreatSchools Puppeteer scrape (deferred; gate-only heuristic currently)

climate.sunny_proxy_note: sunny_proxy now = sunshine_hours_annual / 12 (a fully-sunny 12-hr day = 1 proxy day). Dashboard scoring min(sunny_proxy / 36.5, 10) maps 365 proxy days → 10/10 score.
